violations.text: The basement storage area was observed to have an accumulation of soil residue and debris on the floor behind shelving and storage bins. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024

Per PIC, cookies were made in an unapproved kitchen. FOOD prepared in an unapproved facility may not be used or offered for human consumption in a FOOD ESTABLISHMENT. PIC voluntarily disposed of items at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
The receptacle in the employees toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 09/07/2023

The floor and wall junctures in the under the 3-bay sink do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/24/2023
